summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 54 features: D'CLIC Boost visual, CV Analysis Section, Trajectory auto-population, Skills with source legend, and all 4 tabs. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - D'CLIC boost invite shows for users without dclic_imported (testboost), D'CLIC boost section shows for users with dclic_imported (bob23), CV section loads properly, Skills section shows skill bars with source legend, all 4 tabs render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: D'CLIC Boost Invite Card (data-testid='dclic-boost-invite') correctly shows for users without dclic_imported with 4 dimension placeholders (MBTI, DISC, RIASEC, Vertus) and 'Passer le test' button
D'CLIC Boost Section (data-testid='dclic-boost-section') correctly shows for users with dclic_imported displaying actual values (ENFJ, Influence, Social, Empathie)
CV Section (data-testid='cv-section') with CvAnalysisSection loads properly with upload area
Skills Section (data-testid='skills-section') shows skill bars with source legend (D'CLIC PRO, Analyse CV (IA), Centres d'intérêt, Déclaratif)
All 4 tabs (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching) render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Trajectory steps auto-populated from CV experiences (backend code at routes/cv.py lines 717-757)
bob23 has 5 trajectory steps pre-seeded including D'CLIC PRO completion, BTS Banque, Conseiller clientèle, Transition professionnelle, Chargé de projet RH

test_credentials.beneficiary_with_dclic: bob23 / Solerys777! (dclic_imported=True, MBTI=ENFJ, DISC=Influence, RIASEC=Social, Vertu=Empathie)

seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with dclic_imported=True and 5 trajectory steps pre-seeded. Used existing testboost user without D'CLIC results.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 features fully tested. Key findings: 1) D'CLIC Boost Invite Card shows for users without dclic_imported with 4 dimension placeholders and 'Passer le test' button. 2) D'CLIC Boost Section shows for users with dclic_imported displaying actual dimension values. 3) CV Section with CvAnalysisSection loads properly - audit, centres d'intérêt, and job offer URL sections appear AFTER CV analysis (analysisResult state). 4) Skills section shows skill bars with source legend (4 sources). 5) All 4 tabs (Trajectoire, Compétences, Documents, Matching) work correctly. 6) Trajectory auto-population from CV experiences implemented in routes/cv.py lines 717-757. 7) bob23 has 5 trajectory steps, testboost has 0 steps.

backend_apis: GET /api/profile - bob23 has dclic_imported=True with 4 dimensions ✓
frontend_components: D'CLIC Boost Invite Card (data-testid='dclic-boost-invite') for testboost ✓
4 dimension placeholders (MBTI, DISC, RIASEC, Vertus) in invite card ✓
